task: Surfaced git pull failures in session_start.py to prevent Lochan (and other devs) from working in stale state when they skip manual pulls
discussion_summary: User raised two scenarios: (1) Lochan pulls manually every morning then starts session — works but redundant since session_start already calls git pull. (2) Lochan forgets to pull for 4+ hours and starts session directly — risky because he'd work on stale task assignments and progress. Solution: enhanced session_start.py to surface git pull failures instead of silently swallowing them, ensuring devs are always aware if they're working with outdated state. This prevents the 'working in the dark' problem.

accomplishments.what: Modified session_start.py to surface git pull failures with clear error messaging instead of silent failure
Committed fix(session-start): surface git pull failures instead of swallowing them silently

next_actions.action: Commit the two uncommitted state files (implementation_state.md and notifications.log) to finalize this session
next_actions.why: Clean git status before next session starts; these are session metadata that should be tracked

next_actions.action: Test session_start.py behavior with a simulated git pull failure (e.g., network down, stale credentials) to verify the error surfaces correctly to the user
next_actions.why: Ensure the fix actually prevents silent failures and gives devs actionable feedback

next_actions.action: Document the session_start.py git pull behavior in a README or CONTRIBUTING guide so Lochan and other devs understand they will be blocked if pull fails
next_actions.why: Prevents confusion when pull fails; sets expectation that session start is a git sync point

next_actions.action: Consider adding a --force-pull flag to askr start for edge cases where devs want to override stale state warnings
next_actions.why: Gives power users an escape hatch while keeping safety defaults for most devs

decisions.decision: Surface git pull failures instead of silently continuing with stale state
decisions.reason: User explicitly requested this to prevent Lochan working in the dark on outdated task assignments; safety over convenience

decisions.decision: Keep git pull in session_start.py rather than requiring manual pull before session start
decisions.reason: Automatic pull is more reliable than relying on developer discipline; catches the 4+ hour idle case

relational_files.why: Entry point that calls session_start hooks; changes to session_start behavior affect CLI flow
Defines roster (Lochan, Bippin, etc.); session_start applies to all team members
